description:
This quiz rigorously tests practical skills in context window management, token budgeting, retrieval strategies, and prompt structuring for production AI systems. It begins with accessible questions but rapidly escalates to an advanced difficulty level, challenging users to navigate real-world failure modes and optimization trade-offs. The tone is direct, pragmatic, and no-nonsense, emphasizing shipped product reliability over theoretical or demo-level knowledge.
Topics: Context windows, Token budgets, Retrieval strategies, Prompt structure, AI failure modes, Prompt caching, Hybrid search
Audience: AI engineers, software developers, and technical practitioners building and deploying production-grade LLM applications
